task_completion.description: Page 1 features the image, title, and artist.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the main workspace or page browser thumbnail, the first page contains the Great Wave image, the text 'The Great Wave off Kanagawa', and the text 'Hokusai'.

task_completion.description: Page 2 features the image with arrows/lines and specific labels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the main workspace or page browser thumbnail, the second page contains the Great Wave image, at least three arrows or lines, and the text labels 'foreground', 'background', and 'wave'.

task_completion.description: Page 3 features the title 'Elements of Art' and an analysis using at least three required terms.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the main workspace or page browser thumbnail, the third page contains the title 'Elements of Art' and text that includes at least three of the following words: line, color, shape, texture, contrast, movement.

task_completion.description: The flipchart is saved with the correct name and location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ActivInspire window title bar displays 'artwork_analysis.flipchart' (or similar indicating the saved filename), or a file manager/terminal shows the file 'artwork_analysis.flipchart' in the '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI presentation/whiteboard application (ActivInspire) to create the flipchart.
integrity.visual_evidence: The ActivInspire interface (tools, page browser, menus) is visible in the screenshots, rather than just terminal commands or a text editor.

integrity.description: The analysis on page 3 consists of actual sentences rather than just a disconnected list of the required terms.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text on page 3 forms coherent sentences describing the artwork using the terms (e.g., 'The artist uses contrast...'), not just a comma-separated list.

integrity.description: The arrows/lines on page 2 point to the correct compositional elements.
integrity.visual_evidence: The arrow/line for 'foreground' points to the boats, 'background' points to Mount Fuji, and 'wave' points to the large cresting wave.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The artwork 'The Great Wave off Kanagawa' by Katsushika Hokusai features three boats in the foreground, Mount Fuji in the background, and a dominant cresting wave in the center. The required art elements for analysis are: line, color, shape, texture, contrast, and movement. Ensure the arrows on page 2 point to the correct elements (foreground=boats, background=mountain, wave=large wave).
